prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! It may seem daunting at first, but remember that every task can be broken down into smaller, manageable steps. Just take things one step at a time, and before you know it, you'll be making progress. Don't be too hard on yourself if you struggle at first. Reach out for support when you need it, and celebrate small wins along the way. You've got the skills and resilience to tackle anything that comes your way. So, let's get started and make some progress today!
